title: Gwiezdne wojny Komiks

'''''Gwiezdne wojny Komiks''''' (''Star Wars - Comic'' in Polish) was a magazine published in Poland by [[Egmont]] from [[August]] [[1999]] to the middle of [[2000]]. The magazine consisted of two or three Star Wars-related comic issues, along with several short articles. Eleven issues were published in total, before the magazine's run was cancelled.

Although Egmont stopped publishing ''Star Wars'' comics in Poland altogether in [[2002]], it is currently planning to begin Star Wars-related publications once again, starting with a September 20th issue of the new magazine series called ''[[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks]]''. Despite the change in title, most of the internal features will remain the same, except for a lack of comics. Instead it will contain ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' stories, together with one-shots.

==Media==
===Issues===
*Issue #1 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 1/1999|1/1999]]
**[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest (part I)'']]
**''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]''
**[[Tales from Mos Eisley: Light Duty|''Tales from Mos Eisley'']]

*Issue #2 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 2/1999|2/1999]]
**[[Episode I: Anakin Skywalker|''Anakin Skywalker'']]
**[[Vader's Quest 2|''Vader's Quest (part II)'']]
**[[Shadow Stalker|''Shadow Stalker (part I)'']]*

*Issue #3 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 3/1999|3/1999]]

**[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda|''Boba Fett (part II)'']]

*Issue #6 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 1/2000|1/2000]]

*Issue #7 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 2/2000|2/2000]]
**[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-wing (part III)'']]

*Issue #8 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 3/2000|3/2000]]

**[[Crimson Empire 3|''Crimson Empire (part III)'']]

*Issue #9 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 4/2000|4/2000]]
**"[[Mara Jade: A Night on the Town]]"
**[[Crimson Empire 4|''Crimson Empire (part IV)'']]
**"[[Skippy the Jedi Droid]]"

*Issue #10 -[[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 5/2000|5/2000]]
**[[The Bounty Hunters: Aurra Sing|''Aurra Sing'']]
**[[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire (part V)'']]

*Issue #11 - [[Gwiezdne wojny Komiks 6/2000|6/2000]]

**[[Crimson Empire 6|''Crimson Empire (part VI)'']]
